ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group designation for the experiment */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the experiment was conducted */,
  "compound" TEXT /* Name of the compound used in the experiment */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the compound administered */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the dose */,
  "plate" TEXT /* Identifier for the electrode plate used */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assisting with the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firing_rates" (
  "firing_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firing rate record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the firing rates */,
  "mean_firing_rate" REAL /* Mean firing rate of neurons in Hertz (Hz) */,
  "weighted_mean_firing_rate" REAL /* Weighted mean firing rate of neurons in Hertz (Hz) */,
  "burst_frequency" REAL /* Burst frequency in Hertz (Hz) */,
  "firing_rate_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the mean firing rate */,
  "weighted_mean_firing_rate_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the weighted mean firing rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firing_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "burst_metrics" (
  "burst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each burst record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the burst metrics */,
  "number_of_bursts" INTEGER /* Total number of bursts recorded */,
  "burst_duration_avg" REAL /* Average duration of bursts in seconds */,
  "burst_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of time neurons spent bursting */,
  "inter_burst_interval_avg" REAL /* Average inter-burst interval in seconds */,
  "burst_frequency_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the burst frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("burst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isi_metrics" (
  "isi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISI record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the ISI metrics */,
  "mean_isi_avg" REAL /* Average mean inter-spike interval in seconds */,
  "median_isi_avg" REAL /* Average median inter-spike interval in seconds */,
  "isi_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the inter-spike intervals */,
  "cv_isi" REAL /* Coefficient of variation of the inter-spike intervals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synchrony_index" (
  "synchrony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchrony index record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the synchrony metrics */,
  "synchrony_index" REAL /* Index measuring the synchrony of neuron firing */,
  "width_at_half_height" REAL /* Width at half height of the normalized cross-correlation */,
  "synchrony_index_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the synchrony index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synchrony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrode_metrics" (
  "electrode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrode record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the electrode metrics */,
  "number_of_active_electrodes" INTEGER /* Total number of active electrodes during the experiment */,
  "number_of_electrodes_participating" INTEGER /* Number of electrodes that participated in bursts */,
  "electrode_failure_rate" REAL /* Rate of electrode failure during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electrode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user conducting the experiments */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_info" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_design" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
